sources.name: DLUHC
sources.dataset: Building Safety Programme Monthly Data Release

metadata.methodology: Building counts include all residential buildings over 11 metres identified as having unsafe cladding or other fire safety defects through the Building Safety Programme. Remediation complete means external wall remediation works signed off by the relevant building control body. Data is from DLUHC monthly releases.
knownIssues: The total number of affected buildings is still not fully known — identification is ongoing
Remediation 'complete' may not include all internal fire safety defects
Buildings below 11m are largely excluded from government-funded remediation programmes
Self-reported data from building owners may overstate or understate progress
Waking watch and interim safety costs borne by leaseholders are not centrally tracked
